entities.description: A legume crop used in temporal intercropping with groundnut

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Resources such as water and nutrients available in the environment

entities.description: Intercropping where component crops occupy different spatial niches

entities.name: LIGHT-ENERGY CONVERSION
entities.description: The efficiency of converting light energy into biomass

entities.description: A cereal crop used in drought-stress studies with groundnut

entities.name: DRY-MATTER YIELD

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX

entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form
